description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint and a prominent, moderately sloped hip roof in a dark brown color. The exterior walls are clad in a light beige or tan siding, with a stone or brick foundation visible at the base. The house features a covered porch at the front, supported by columns, and a large carport or covered driveway extending from one side. Multiple windows of varying sizes are symmetrically arranged on both floors, with white framing that contrasts with the siding. The main entryway is sheltered by the porch, and the house sits on a flat, grassy plot, suggesting a residential neighborhood setting.
description: A two-story suburban house with a hip roof, beige siding, a covered front porch, and a large side carport. Symmetrical windows and a stone foundation give it a classic, residential appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, and several windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large carport, side windows, and the extension of the roof over the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional windows, and the continuation of the stone foundation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport from another angle and the symmetrical window arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single main door, and a small set of steps
